Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Li Markuth]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Li Markuth is the Grand Patriarch of the Li Clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Li Markuth is a Gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Li Markuth has black-veined white wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Li Markuth's wings extend to fifteen feet on either side of the Patriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Li Markuth intends to claim the whole of Sacred Valley as his personal territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Gold bodies are partially made of madra, like a Remnant's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Li Markuth is a man with white-striped hair and madra gathered in balls of force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Li Markuth was sentenced to trial for spatial violation and attempted domination of local inhabitants.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Li Markuth is someone who has died.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Li Markuth is a winged terror that Suriel banished.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Li Markuth can call wind aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Li Markuth was an Archlord when he left Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Li Markuth has living storms bound in his wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Li Markuth has a song stored in his heart that can shatter minds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Li Markuth's flesh is dim white and emanates unrestrained hunger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Markuth uses a sword that can cut through space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Markuth created a weapon that is compatible with storm madra and acts like a sentient parasite.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Markuth uses a song from his heart that forms invisible razors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Markuth uses a Ruler technique fueled with soulfire and wisdom from beyond the world to increase air pressure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Markuth uses a Striker technique to form emerald cyclones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Markuth uses a Forger technique in the shape of an ancient warrior's fist made from dark green wind madra.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
